    About Us

    We are an international financial company engaged in crypto investment and trading activities, which are related to trading on financial markets, forex and cryptocurrency exchanges performed by qualified professional traders and cryptocurrency advisers.

    We are registered as private limited company in the united Kingdom under the registration for England and Wales, at 5 Brayford Square, London E1 0SG. Our company registration number is 14444167,

    Our goal is to provide our investors with a reliable source of high income, while minimizing any possible risks and offering a high-quality service, allowing us to automate and simplify the relations between the investors and the trustees. We work towards increasing your profit margin by profitable investment. crypto-bitcoininvest.com is an officially registered company which gives its clients all required guarantees, including confidentiality of data provided by clients at the registration procedure. Apart from this we guarantee accrual of requested payments in due time and full amount. The company's system, including support service, works 24 hours, which means you are always welcome to contact our experts in case you have any questions. We look forward to you being part of our community.
    You can check out our company terms and conditions in order to know more about us.
    You can download our company documentation below.

    Read Our Terms and Conditions

    Investment Plans

    To make a solid investment, you have to know where you are investing. Find a plan which is best for you. It is recommended you know the calculation before investing in any plan to help you avoid mistakes. Enter any plan in the calculator to know how much you will earn in 30 days. This will help you to avoid mistakes. For clarification, the percentage of each plan will be calculated within the amount range in a particular plan. This therefore means that, the amount you will get in the calculator starts from the minimum investment amount of that plan. For example; if you deposit $100 on 4% plan, you will earn $4 per day and $120 in 30 days. If you invest $5000 on 4% daily plan, you will earn $200 per day and $6000 in 30 days. Simply use the chosen plan, divide the percentage by 100 and multiply the result by your invested amount. Example; 4/100*100=$4 same applies to all the other plans. Note that you can deposit any amount within a particular plan range.

    "MODERN PLAN" BTC, USDT, XRP, ETH & DOGE

    • Return 4.00%
    • Every Day
    • For 30 Day
    • Total 120% + Capital
    $100.00 - $2,000.00
    Invest Now

    $600.00 - $5,000.00
    Invest Now

    • Total 210% + Capital

    Invest Now

    "VIP PRO" BTC, USDT, XRP, ETH, BNB & DO

    • Every Day

    Why Choose Crypto-bitcoininvest.com

    Our goal is to provide our investors with a reliable source of high income, while minimizing any possible risks and offering a high-quality service. Cryptocurrency is changing the financial positions of many today all over the world. Do not miss the chances to become financially stable now and in the future.

    Legal Company

    Our company conducts absolutely legal activities in the legal field. We are certified to operate investment business, we are legal and safe.

    High reliability

    We are trusted by a huge number of people. We are working hard constantly to improve the level of our security system and minimize possible risks.

    Anonymity

    Anonymity and using cryptocurrency as a payment instrument. In the era of electronic money – this is one of the most convenient ways of cooperation.

    Quick Withdrawal

    Our all retreats are treated spontaneously once requested. There are high maximum limits. The minimum withdrawal amount is only $10 .

    Referral Program

    We are offering a certain level of referral income through our referral program. you can increase your income by simply refer a few people.

    24/7 Support

    We provide 24/7 customer support through e-mail and telegram. Our support representatives are periodically available to elucidate any difficulty.

    Dedicated Server

    We are using a dedicated server for the website which allows us exclusive use of the resources of the entire server.

    SSL Secured

    Comodo Essential-SSL Security encryption confirms that the presented content is genuine and legitimate.

    DDOS Protection

    We are using one of the most experienced, professional, and trusted DDoS Protection and mitigation provider.

    Profit Calculator

    You must know the calculation before investing in any plan, so you never make mistakes. Check the calculation and you will get as our calculator says. Once you choose an investment plan and click on invest, you'll be ask to create an account to get started. There are several crypto currencies you can use to deposit or withdraw. For each investment plan you choose, you earn a particular profit per day. Use the percentage and calculate how much you will earn per day in 30 days. withdrawals are performed daily. Enter the amount you want to invest on the calculator to know what you will earn.

    How Crypto-bitcoininvest Works

    Get involved in our tremendous platform and Invest. We will utilize your money and give you profit in your wallet automatically. We've been into crypto investment and trading for years and performs this for long term investors. Create and account, Get it verified, enable your 2FA authentication, Make your first deposit and wait for your investment to grow.

    1

    Create Account

    2

    Invest To Plan

    3

    Get Profit

    Frequently Asked Questions

    We answer some of your Frequently Asked Questions regarding our platform. If you have a query that is not answered here, Please contact us.

    You can click on the Sign Up button to or simply click on your chosen investment plan and click on the invest button, you'll be asked to create and account.

    Once you create an account, in your account dashboard, you will see options to perform KYC verification. click on it and submit KYC verification requirement.

    Once in your account dashboard, you'll get the option to enable 2FA, click on it Download the Google authenticator app and scan the QR code on your dashboard or copy the setup key on your account dashboard and paste in your Google authenticator app.

    Once in your account dashboard, click on 'Finance' and choose either Deposit/withdrawals or Transfer. Transfer means you can send funds to a members account of crypto-bitcoininvest.com. you'll see options to choose what crypto you want to deposit

    You can withdraw the full amount of your account balance minus the funds that are used currently for supporting opened positions. You can withdraw as small as $10.

    Simply click on your investment plan or at the top right corner icon to login
